nasb.text: Behold, all those who are angered at you will be shamed and dishonored; Those who contend with you will be as nothing and will perish.

esv.text: Behold, all who are incensed against you shall be put to shame and confounded; those who strive against you shall be as nothing and shall perish.

cnv.text: 看哪！向你發怒的都必蒙羞受辱； 與你相爭的人，都要如同無有，並要滅亡。

ccb.text: “看啊，向你发怒的人必抱愧蒙羞； 与你为敌的人都要灭亡， 归于无有。

csbs.text: 看哪！对你发怒的， 都必蒙羞受辱； 与你相争的， 都如同无有，必要灭亡。
